title: Norway vs Senegal lineups: Confirmed team news, predicted XIs, injury latest for World Cup today | The Standard
original_text:
Norway vs Senegal lineups: Confirmed team news, predicted XIs, injury latest for World Cup today
The Norwegians got off to a flying start in Group I as they thrashed Iraq 4-1 in their opener, with Haaland scoring twice.
France are fully expected to beat Iraq in their Philadelphia encounter, and as such, it is thought that Norway and Senegal will do battle for second place in Group I.
Norway boss Stale Solbakken will be hanging most of his hopes on Haaland, who will be fed by Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard in a 4-4-2 system.
Elsewhere for the Scandinavians, they will have former Aston Villa shot-stopper Orjan Nyland in goal, with Julian Ryerson and David Moller Wolfe at full-back.
Leo Ostigard scored off the bench in the opener, but it is likely that he will be overlooked once more for Kristoffer Ajer and Torbjorn Heggem in the heart of defence.
Star duo: Erling Haaland and Martin Odegaard will look to fire Norway past Senegal
Getty
Odegaard is given a free role from the right side of the midfield quartet, drifting and sitting in centre-field, while Antonio Nusa gets high and wide off the left.
In the middle, workhorses Sander Berge and Fredrik Aursnes will be asked to cover a lot of ground. Up top, Haaland will be partnered by Atletico Madrid’s Alexander Sorloth.
For the Senegalese, former Chelsea goalkeeper Edouard Mendy will be between the posts, with Krepin Diatta and West Ham’s El Hadji Malick Diouf as the full-backs.
Kalidou Koulibaly and Moussa Niakhate are in the middle, with the two Gueyes in the engine room - Pape and Idrissa Gana - although don’t be surprised to see Habib Diarra of Sunderland come in for Lamine Camara as the No10 in Pape Thiaw’s 4-2-3-1 system.
Out wide, Ismaila Sarr and Sadio Mane are practically nailed-on starters, with Nicolas Jackson - whose Chelsea future remains uncertain - leading the line.
Predicted Norway XI (4-4-2): Nyland; Ryerson, Ajer, Heggem, Wolfe; Odegaard, Berge, Aursnes, Nusa; Haaland, Sorloth
Predicted Senegal XI (4-2-3-1): Mendy; Diatta, Koulibaly, Niakhate, Diouf; I Gueye, P Gueye; I Sarr, Diarra, Mane; Jackson
Date and time: 1am BST on Tuesday June 23, 2026
Venue: New York/New Jersey Stadium (MetLife Stadium)
How to watch: ITV
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
